name: Depot
description: Remote Docker / OCI image build service with persistent BuildKit cache. Provision a build via the BuildService.createBuild API to get a build_id + build_token, then drive the actual layer build with the depot CLI / buildx against the same id. Pricing is pay-per-build-minute (tracked per second).

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Organization-scoped Depot API token from depot.dev/settings/tokens

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in the organization.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a new project. Args: name, region_id (e.g. us-east-1), cache_policy?

tools.name: create_build
tools.description: Provision a new build slot. Returns build_id + build_token used to drive the actual build via buildx / depot CLI. Args: project_id.

tools.name: finish_build
tools.description: Mark a build complete with a status. Args: build_id, status (success | error | canceled), error_message?.

tools.name: list_builds
tools.description: List builds for a project. Args: project_id, page_size?, page_token?.

tools.name: get_build
tools.description: Get a single build's status, timings, and artifact metadata. Args: build_id.

tools.name: cancel_build
tools.description: Cancel an in-progress build. Args: build_id.
